items.title: Scientists discover a hidden cause of aging cells that can be reversed
items.summary: Researchers discovered that declining levels of phosphatidylcholine may be a major cause of age-related mitochondrial dysfunction and loss of cellular energy. items.title: Scientists shut down cancer DNA repair to overcome drug resistance
items.summary: Cancer cells often survive treatment by fixing the DNA damage that therapy is meant to cause. Researchers found that UNI418 can disrupt this repair ability, leaving cancer cells more exposed. When combined with a PARP inhibitor, it helped resistant cancer cells respond to treatment again.
